workspace.title: Run a focused repository review
workspace.description: Upload a ZIP snapshot, choose review depth, and keep the whole review budget visible before the job starts.

pipeline.title: Review pipeline
pipeline.description: A visible path from repository submission to human-confirmed, exportable results.
pipeline.working: The request stays open while the repository is indexed and reviewed. Larger repositories can take several minutes.

stages.title: Submit code
stages.description: Upload a ZIP snapshot and choose review depth.

stages.title: Secure index
stages.description: Validate paths and limits, redact secrets, and record ignored files.

stages.title: Rule scan
stages.description: Check standards, duplication, security signals, and potential risk.

stages.title: LLM review
stages.description: Profile the repository, review files, and reason across modules.

stages.title: Classify
stages.description: Normalize severity, category, confidence, evidence, and remediation.

stages.title: Human confirm
stages.description: Triage every finding as open, needs review, ignored, or fixed.

stages.title: Write back
stages.description: Persist decisions and export the latest Markdown or JSON report.

upload.title: Start a code review
upload.description: Upload a project ZIP. The service reads source text without executing project code or installing project dependencies.
upload.file_hint: ZIP only, up to 25 MB and 1,200 files.
upload.mode_security: Security focused - auth, permissions, data, and injection
upload.mode_standard_hint: Best default for routine release checks and balanced signal.
upload.mode_deep_hint: Adds more cross-file reasoning for larger changes and architecture risk.
upload.mode_security_hint: Focuses on auth, payment, API exposure, data leaks, and permissions.
upload.insufficient_credits: This review requires {required} credits. You have {remaining} credits.
upload.instructions_placeholder: Example: focus on auth, database access, payment flows, duplicate business rules, or production readiness.
upload.file_too_large: The ZIP must be 25 MB or smaller.

list.title: Review history
list.description: {total, plural, =0 {No reviews yet.} =1 {1 review generated.} other {# reviews generated.}}
list.empty: Upload a project ZIP to generate your first code review report.

report.title: Live report
report.description: Risk and exports are rebuilt from the latest human confirmation state.
report.not_ready: The report has not been generated yet.
report.ignored_description: Files skipped by safety, path, size, dependency, or asset filters.

findings.title: Findings and human confirmation
findings.description: Filter the issue set, inspect evidence, and write the confirmed state back to the review.
findings.empty: No findings match the current filters.
findings.update_failed: Could not update the finding status.
